pipelines.label: Legacy Many-Pass (production writer)

passes.description: Source brain -> briefs (science: news_interpreter.build_news_briefs; generated content fields, not templates).
Cast craft (shared radio craft; casting_brief is interpreter output).
Coda per coda_mode; science implementation is compose_news_coda.
meta.story_brief reflection pass (writer :5438, K.5.5). NOT pack-overridable in v1; bridge path must not require it.

notes: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY: the production writer owns the real sequence; this list is stamping/audit metadata (kibitz r1).
Slot roles document which engine slot each pass uses; engine ids are resolved at runtime from production widgets and stamped by production.

pipelines.label: Simple 4-Prompt Experimental

passes.description: Complete source-grounded story; no JSON output.
Fill the production ledger shape from the story.
Repair schema: required fields, enums, ids.
Consistency audit; if the ledger cannot be made valid, fail loudly naming this pass.

notes: Visible experiment, never a fallback: failure NEVER routes to legacy_many_pass.
Adaptive cleanup is documentation-only (kibitz r1 cut): no schema, no allowlist code, nothing loads it.
